title: arrhenatherum setaceum
intro: Arrhenatherum setaceum, also known as oaten milk or false oat-grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin infections. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum setaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
